import pmtiles.reader as r
import json

    reader = r.Reader\(f\)
    header = reader.header\(\)
    meta = reader.metadata\(\)
    print\('HEADER:', json.dumps\(dict\(header\), default=str\)\)
    print\('META:', json.dumps\(meta, default=str\)\)

import json

with open\('/Users/miguel.ros/Desktop/Temas/Tiempo acceso hospital/mapa/healthcare_h3.pmtiles', 'rb'\) as f:

    header = reader.header\(\)

    print\('META:', json.dumps\(meta, default=str\)\)

Bash(python3 -c "
from pmtiles.reader import MmapSource, Reader
import json

with open\('/Users/miguel.ros/Desktop/Temas/Tiempo acceso hospital/mapa/healthcare_h3_h4.pmtiles', 'rb'\) as f:
    reader = Reader\(MmapSource\(f\)\)
    header = reader.header\(\)
    meta = reader.metadata\(\)
    print\('min_zoom:', header['min_zoom'], 'max_zoom:', header['max_zoom']\)
    print\('center_zoom:', header['center_zoom']\)
    print\('vector_layers:', json.dumps\(meta.get\('vector_layers'\), indent=2\)\)
    print\('tilestats layers:', json.dumps\(meta.get\('tilestats',{}\).get\('layers'\), indent=2, default=str\)\)
    print\('generator_options:', meta.get\('generator_options',''\)\)
")
